title: Final Driver Exam Practice Reflection
summary: Create and answer a mini driver-exam practice set with reasoning.
studentInstructions: Create a file named final-practice-test.txt or final-practice-test.md.
Each question should have four answer choices.
Mark the correct answer for each question.
Add a one-sentence explanation for why the correct answer is best.
Include at least two questions about road signs, two about right-of-way, two about parking/control, and two about risk/safety.

rubric.description: The practice set covers road signs, right-of-way, parking/control, and risk/safety.
Correct answers are reasonable and consistent with safe driving principles.
Explanations show clear reasoning rather than only naming the answer.
Questions are clear, plausible, and close to driver-exam style.

gradingInstructions: Use only this assignment and its rubric.
Do not require exact DMV wording, but unsafe reasoning should lose points.
